brief_notes: Accurately covers the core findings: Ema2 as SUMO E3 ligase binding Ubc9, ~50% reduction in high-MW SUMO conjugates (>200 kDa), Spt6 as major substrate, chromatin association defects, lncRNA loss at three IES boundaries, TDSD failure, and reduced progeny viability. Methods section faithfully reproduces buffer compositions and experimental protocols from extraction. Tables effectively organize phenotypic data. Less complete than orchestrated version -- notably missing the Spt6-C-KR mutant analysis and detailed timeline data. One minor hallucination in stating progeny viability was 'reduced' rather than noting zero viable progeny. Overall excludes figures per rubric.
